content.text:
I'll start by understanding the project structure and current state.
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && git log --oneline -5</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && ls -la</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "*.md" | head -20</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && ls -la tasks/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No tasks directory"</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && cat package.json | head -30</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

**Warmup Complete**

I've successfully initialized in the project directory and confirmed:

**Project State:**
- Git status: Clean, on main branch
- Recent commits show focus on UI polish, branding updates, and feature additions (Timer tab, modal scaling)
- This is the "Neuman Brain Dashboard" - a privacy-first knowledge management system

**Tech Stack Confirmed:**
- React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Vite 7, Zustand 5, Tailwind CSS
- Local-first architecture with IndexedDB
- Dev, build, test, and lint commands available

**Project Structure:**
- Source code in `/src` with components, stores, and utilities
- Documentation in `/docs` covering technical and product guidance
- Task tracking system for feature work
- Comprehensive CLAUDE.md providing development standards

**Current State:**
- Most recent work: UI polish, modal content scaling, calendar unification, Timer tab feature
- No active task files (clean state)
- Ready for new work

I'm ready to accept requirements and design implementation plans following the established patterns and architecture of this privacy-first dashboard application. Please provide the requirements you'd like me to plan for.
